Further below, three variations of a monogram "A" are shown, utilizing the same unique "A" from the main logo, each with a different segment of the blue-to-green gradient. *   **Color Palette and Lighting:** Dominant use of neon/LED strip lighting in cool tones (cyan, blue, green) outlining architectural features, contrasting with a vivid magenta cylindrical structure and iridescent, multi-colored panels that serve as a backdrop/feature wall.
